candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The elements I and Te have similar average atomic masses. A sample that was believed to be a mixture of I and Te was run through a mass spectrometer which separates a sample by mass into isotopes, resulting in the data below. All of the following statements are true. Which one would be the best basis for concluding that the sample was pure Te?
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: I consists of only one naturally occurring isotope with 74 neutrons, whereas Te has more than one isotope
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
题干: I 和 TE 是两种元素,具有相似的平均原子质量。一份样品经质谱仪分析,发现其中含有 I 和 TE 的混合物。质谱仪能够将样品按质量分离成同位素。以下哪一项是判断该样品是否为纯净物质的最佳依据?

A. TE 形成 $-2$ 电荷的离子,而 I 以 $-1$ 电荷形成离子。
B. TE 在宇宙中的丰度高于 I。
C. I 只有一种天然存在的同位素,含有 $74$ 个中子,而 TE 有多种同位素。
D. I 的第一电离能高于 TE。
metadata.explanation_zh: 该图显示了基于质量数的不同同位素的相对丰度。同一元素的同位素具有相同的质子数,但中子数不同,导致质量数不同。如果混合物中含有碘(I),其唯一稳定同位素含有74个中子,则其质量数为127(74个中子+53个质子)。然而,图中并未在质量数127处出现峰值,表明混合物中不含碘。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The sample is semantically understandable overall. The graph is readable and shows multiple isotope peaks for tellurium with no peak at mass 127, which supports the provided answer that iodine has only one naturally occurring isotope with 74 neutrons while tellurium has several. Although the original wording refers to multiple-choice options that are not shown, the rewritten/open form and answer target make the task clear.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
